content.text:
Invalid `new_str` parameter: // Get location information
  int actualLine = fileInfo.baseLine + token->getLine() - 1;
  std::string locInfo = " Loc=<" + fileInfo.currentFile + ":" + std::to_string(actualLine) + ":" +
                        std::to_string(token->getCharPositionInLine() + 1) +
                        ">";. No replacement was performed. `new_str` and `old_str` must be different.
